# Utilify - Online Utility Tools

> A premium, client-side utility suite for developers, designers, and everyday tasks.

All operations on Utilify are processed locally inside your web browser. No files or data are uploaded to external servers, ensuring maximum privacy and security.

## Main Sections

- [Utility Tools](https://www.utilifytools.dpdns.org/#/tools) - A collection of over 60 utility tools, categorized into Encoders, Decoders, Calculators, Image/Design, File/Document, SEO, and Security.
- [Scan & Activity History](https://www.utilifytools.dpdns.org/#/history) - Access stored scanning logs, conversion histories, and local metadata.
- [About Utilify](https://www.utilifytools.dpdns.org/#/about) - Technical design overview, local-first computing details, and offline availability.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.utilifytools.dpdns.org/#/terms) - Standard local-use terms and user agreements.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.utilifytools.dpdns.org/#/privacy) - Client-side processing declaration and privacy metrics.
